info.name: Project Notification API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Project Notification feature.

Contains 4 folders:
1. Project Notifications — CRUD, approve/reject, export, employees-with-locations
2. Procedure Settings (Setup) — Parent procedure settings, workflow toggle, types
3. Internal Procedures & Steps — Create internal procedures (form=createProjectNotificationTask), manage steps (action takers), conditions, available-forms, approval-responsibles
4. Employee Task Lifecycle — Start task, end task, available actions, and admin approve/reject for start/end requests

Flow to set up Project Notification procedures:
1. GET /procedure-settings/types → see available types
2. GET /procedure-settings?type=employee_task → find the parent EmployeeTask procedure setting
3. POST /procedure-settings/internal-procedures → create internal procedure with form=createProjectNotificationTask
4. GET /procedure-settings/{parentId}/available-forms → see all forms applicable to employee_task type
5. POST /procedure-settings/{procedureSettingId}/steps → create approval steps with action takers
6. GET /procedure-settings/approval-responsibles?type=employee_task&form=createProjectNotificationTask → preview who will approve
7. GET /procedure-settings/forms-conditions?type=createProjectNotificationTask → see condition definitions
8. PUT /procedure-settings/{parentId}/internal-procedures/{internalProcedureId} → update conditions (enable/disable, change settings)
9. POST /projects/notifications → create a notification (triggers the workflow)

variable.description: The parent ProcedureSetting ID for type=employee_task. Get it from GET /procedure-settings?type=employee_task

The InternalProcedureSetting ID (child with form=createProjectNotificationTask). Get it from POST /procedure-settings/internal-procedures or GET /procedure-settings/{parentId}/internal-procedures/by-form/createProjectNotificationTask
Numeric step ID within a procedure setting
Linked EmployeeTaskRequest ID (returned in employee_task.id after creating a notification)
EmployeeTaskStartRequest ID (returned when start task triggers a workflow)
EmployeeTaskEndRequest ID (returned when end task triggers a workflow)

item.name: 1. Project Notifications (CRUD)
item.description:
Core Project Notification endpoints — list, create, get, update, delete, approve, reject, export, employees-with-locations.

Base path: {{url}}/projects/notifications

query.description: Filter by status (pending, approved, rejected, in_progress, completed, cancelled)
Search in notification_number, contractor_name, work_description, repair_point
Sort field (created_at, task_date, notification_number, status, severity). Append _desc or _asc

formdata.description: Required - UUID of the project (Step 1: Project selection)
Required - UUID of the assigned engineer (Step 2: Employee selection from employees-with-locations)
Required - Task date Y-m-d (Step 3: Date & duration)
Required - Duration in hours (0.25 to 24) (Step 3: Date & duration)
Nullable - Severity (منخفض, متوسط, عالي). Default: منخفض (Step 5: Details)
Nullable - Contractor technical number (Step 5: Contractor info)
Nullable - Location radius in meters (Step 4: Location)
Nullable - Selected distance in meters (Step 4: Location — from employees-with-locations response)
Nullable - UUID of approval responsible (auto-resolved from workflow if omitted)
Nullable - Attachment files (max 20MB each, multiple files allowed)

item.name: Get Employees With Locations (Step 2 of Wizard)

query.description: Nullable - Filter radius in meters (only show employees within this distance)

item.name: 2. Procedure Settings (Setup)
item.description:
Parent procedure settings for type=employee_task. These endpoints are used to:
- List/find the parent procedure setting for employee_task type
- Toggle branch workflows
- Get available procedure setting types
- Get approval responsibles preview for createProjectNotificationTask form

IMPORTANT: The parent procedure setting for employee_task is auto-created by EmployeeTaskWorkflowSeeder or InternalProcedureSettingsSeeder. You only need these endpoints to find it and configure workflows.

query.description: Required - Filter by procedure type. Use 'employee_task' for Project Notifications
Optional - Filter by branch ID (management hierarchy)
Optional - Filter by parent procedure setting ID

response.name: Success Response

item.name: Toggle Branch Workflow (Enable/disable for a branch)

query.description: Required - Internal process form key. Use 'createProjectNotificationTask' for Project Notifications
Optional - Branch ID for branch-specific workflow

response.name: Success Response (With workflow steps)

item.name: 3. Internal Procedures & Steps
item.description:
Internal procedures are child procedure_settings with a `form` key. For Project Notifications, the form key is 'createProjectNotificationTask'.

The seeder (InternalProcedureSettingsSeeder) auto-creates this internal procedure for every company. You can also create it manually via POST /procedure-settings/internal-procedures.

Steps are the approval workflow steps within an internal procedure — each step has action takers (specific users, management hierarchy, etc.).

Setup flow:
1. GET /procedure-settings/{parentId}/available-forms → see all forms for employee_task
2. POST /procedure-settings/internal-procedures → create internal procedure (if not auto-seeded)
3. GET /procedure-settings/{parentId}/internal-procedures/by-form/createProjectNotificationTask → get the internal procedure
4. POST /procedure-settings/{procedureSettingId}/steps → create approval steps
5. PUT /procedure-settings/{parentId}/internal-procedures/{internalId} → update conditions
6. GET /procedure-settings/forms-conditions?type=createProjectNotificationTask → see condition definitions

item.name: Get Available Forms for employee_task parent
List All Internal Procedures (Optional type filter)

item.name: 4. Employee Task Lifecycle (Start/End)
item.description:
Endpoints for the assigned employee to start/end the linked task and for admins to approve/reject the resulting workflow requests.

Base path: {{url}}/employee-tasks and {{url}}/admin/employee-tasks

Project notifications use the dedicated StartProjectNotificationTask / EndProjectNotificationTask internal procedures under the 'مهام الصيانة والطوارئ' parent.

item.name: Take Generic Procedure Action (Confirm Presence / Update)

response.name: Success Response
Rejected Response
